CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicare Fee-For-Service Institutional Claims
Version — March 2025
Short SAS name Long SAS name Label Type Length HOP file sequence1 New variables
Base claim file
BENE_ID BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15 1
CLM_ID CLM_ID Claim ID CHAR 15 2
RIC_CD NCH_NEAR_LINE_REC_IDENT_CD NCH Near Line Record Identification Code (RIC) CHAR 1 3
CLM_TYPE NCH_CLM_TYPE_CD NCH Claim Type Code CHAR 2 4
FROM_DT CLM_FROM_DT Claim From Date DATE 8
